library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Saray proyekto na boses tan gitara yo, manlapud ideya anggad pangipaway.

no_results.title: Anggapoy naromog ya proyekto
no_results.description: Salien ya i-adjust so search o status filter.

empty.title: Anggapoy karga na librarya yo
empty.description: Igapo so balon proyekto manlapud gapo, odino i-import iray wala lad disk mo.

project_dialog.title: Balon proyekto
project_dialog.description: Ikdan mo na ngaran tan pilien so paraan na panagrekord.

album_dialog.title: Balon album
album_dialog.description: Igrupo iray misiglaotan a proyekto ed sakey ya album.

album.empty: Anggapo ni ray proyekto ed sayan album.
album.delete_confirm_description: Saray proyekto et ag nabura, naandi labat ed " {{name}} ".

delete_project.confirm_description: Saya so mangekal ed proyekto tan amin a naala ed satan. Agla nayarin ipawil iya.

record.title: Rekord
record.subtitle: Manggawa na malinis ya take, bantayan iray lebel mo, tan tumboken so script.

guide.title: Sesyon ya walay giya
guide.subtitle: Abuloyan mo so coach ya mangigiya ed sika ed script ya kundang-kundang, manlapud warm-up anggad spoken phrase.
guide.unavailable: Say guided session et agni naala ed server.
guide.select_project_device: Manpili na proyekto tan input device pian narekord iray kundang manlapud dia.
guide.no_record_step: Warm-up step — agla kaukolan so manrekord.
guide.complete_body: Inrekord mo so kada kundang na script. Pawil ka ed Audio tab na proyekto tan pilien mo ray paborito mon takes.

best2min.hint: Manggawa na energy tan clarity analysis ed interon take pian naromog so sankabiskegan ya 2-minuton bintana — sarag mo nin siansia ya i-adjust so range panamegley na lima kayari to.
best2min.unavailable: Say sankaabigan ya 2-minuton panagsukimat et agni naala ed sayan server.

record.takes_empty: Anggapo ni so nirekord ya take ed sayan sesyon.

no_takes.title: Anggapo ni so naala
no_takes.description: Manrekord na balon take odino mangi-import na wala lan file.

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Say raw audio tan amin ya naproseso lan bersion et naekal.

pipeline.title: Kadena na panagproseso
pipeline.stage_requires_extra: Kaukolan so ekstra ya ag ni aka-install

export.title: Export take
export.description: I-render so unor a file manlapud sakey a naproseso lan bersion.

notes.placeholder: Saray libren nota nipaakar ed sayan proyekto...

lyrics.placeholder: Isulat so liriko dia. Usaren so paleta ed gilig pian isuksok iray meta-tag na Suno.
lyrics.versions_empty: Anggapo ni so aka-save ya bersion.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Say kaplesan ya teksto et salatan na bersion ya aka-save ed {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Pindoten so sakey a tag pian isuksok itan ed cursor.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: Ag-apaneknekan — nayarin anggapoy epekto to ed resulta.

prompts.preview_empty: Manpili na template tan isulat iray variable pian nanengneng so preview.
prompts.char_count_warning: Saray style prompts ya masulok ya 1000 ya karakter et nayarin putoten nen Suno.

stems.title: Boses tan gitara
stems.empty: Sayan take et agni nisian. Iparaan so separasyon pian narengel so boses tan gitara ya manbukbukor.
stems.capability_missing: Say source separation et ag aka-install ed sayan server.
stems.unavailable: Anggapo ni so vocal/guitar separation ed sayan server.

import.title: Import
import.subtitle: Iyakar ed library iray proyekto ya wala lad disk.

step1.title: Anapen so folder
step1.description: Ituro so root folder ya walaan na saray proyekto tan track mo.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: Ag-aromog so FFmpeg — saray file ya kaukolan ya i-convert et nalaktawan.

step2.title: Repasoen iray bengatla
step2.description: Nengnengen iray ngaran, kipapasen, tan no antoy i-import antis ya kumpirmaen.

step3.title: Import
step3.description: Kumpirmaen ya nakopya iray file tan manggawa na saray proyekto.
step3.copy_originals: Ikopya iray orihinal ya file ed library
step3.done_description: Saray proyekto ed leksab et ginawa ed librarya yo.

templates.title: Saray plantilya
templates.subtitle: Saray nausar lamet ya prompt templates tan meta-tags parad Suno.

editor.template_hint: Markaan no iner so kawalaan na kada variable ya say ngaran to et akabalot na doble ya kulot ya brace — alimbawa, say variable ya tatawagen ya "genre" et magmaliw ya genre ya akabalot ed duaran opening tan closing braces.

metatags.title: Meta-tags
metatags.subtitle: Saray tag na istruktura tan estilo et nabidbir nen Suno iray liriko ed loob.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Impormasyon na sistema, lenguahe, tan saray default ya labay.
settings.lufs_target_hint: Uusaren bilang gapoan ya suhestion no man-export na takes. Say default nen Suno et manga -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Suno recording guide
guide.subtitle: Panon ya naala so boses tan gitara pian nawalaan na sankaabigan iran resulta.
guide.intro: Say Suno et sankaabigan ya nagagawa no malinis tan anggapoy panduaruwaan iran reperensya. Sayan giya et mansaklaw ed panagparaan, target levels, tan 3-5 minuton recording script.

prep.title: Panagparaan
prep.body: Irekord ed sakey a kuarton aasikasoen odino sakey a walaan na dakel a malambot a materyales (saray kurtina, alpombra, kawes ed aparador). I-off iray bentilador tan antokaman ya man-uungol. Painitan moy boses mo ed loob na 5 minuto antis kan manrekord.

levels.title: Antas: -12 anggad -6 dBFS
levels.body: Man-aim ed saray peak ya walad baetan na -12 tan -6 dBFS ed meter. Diad leksab na satan a laknab, mas naimano so ungol ed beneg; diad tagey to, ontagey so peligro na panagputot. Usaren so metro ed Record page pian i-set so gain mo antis kan onggapo.

distance.title: Mic distansya: 15-30 cm
distance.body: Manarawi na 15 anggad 30 cm ed mikropono. Say mas asingger nen say satan et mamapaawet ed saray plosives tan proximity effect; no mas arawi et mas dakel so narereverb tan ungol na kuarto.

script.title: Manrekord na script
script.vowels: Sustained vowels — a, e, i, o, u
script.dynamics: Dinamiko: onggapo ya anlemew, manampot ya maksil
script.spoken_phrase: Sakey ya balikas, pian nabasa nen Suno so tono na boses mo

expectations.title: No antoy iilaloan nen Suno
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, dry (anggapoy reverb o epekto), 3 anggad 5 minutos ya reperensya. Say sankalinisan, sankarepresentatibon 2 minuto na panag-ala so kaslakan ya mamawala na sankaabigan iran resulta.

suno_voice_full.name: Kompleton vocal script parad Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: 5 guided minutes: warm-up, vowels, scales, duaran song excerpts, dynamics, tan sakey a spoken phrase.

step.warmup_inst: Manpainawa ka panamegley na pan-yawn, lip trills (brrr), tan maalwar ya ungol ed loob na sakey minuto. Agmo la kaukolan so manrekord — pian narelaks mo labat so eleng mo antis kan mangansion.
step.vowels_inst: Bembenan so kada bokales — a, e, i, o, u — ed loob na 3 anggad 4 a segundo ed komportablen tono, ya ag-onkukurang so boses to. Saya so ontulong ed si Suno pian naala toy puron tono na boses mo.
step.scales_inst: Mankanta na simplin timbangan ya patagey insan paabeba, ed "la" o "na". Agla kaukolan ya perpekto itan — say gagala et pian na-map so vocal range mo.
step.section_inst: Kantaen so 8 anggad 16 a bar na kanta, tekep na peteg ya intension ya labay mon ipasabi. Iyuna so kalinew tan kiwawala nen say teknikal ya inkayadyari.
step.section2_inst: Mankanta na 8 anggad 16 a bar — mas maabig no sakey a koro odino sakey a seksion ya midumaan ed samay inmuna. Say mas dakel a klase na boses so ontulong ed modelo pian naaralan so boses mo.
step.dynamics_inst: Kantaen so parehon balikas ya onggapo ed anlemew tan manampot ya maksil, ya ag-ipapaga so eleng mo. Ipapanengneng na saya ed Suno so dinamikon laknab na boses mo.
step.spoken_inst: Mansalita ka — ag ka mangansion — na antikey tan natural a balikas, a singa ka mansasalita. Saya so ontulong ed si Suno pian nabidbir so peteg a tono na boses mo.

stages.fade: Onkupas ed loob / onkupas ed paway

errors.validation_error: Nengnengen so impormasyon ya inloob mo.
errors.device_busy: Say audio device et uusaren na sananey a programa.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: Say FFmpeg et ag-aka-install — i-install mo pian na-convert iyan file.
errors.permission_denied: Ag-inawat so permiso parad niiter a dalan.
errors.import_path_not_found: Ag aromog so dalan na import.
